title: SystemInfo
description: Static system information. Sent once immediately on connection. Not a delta — always a full object.

os.description: Operating system name and version (e.g. 'Arch Linux', 'Ubuntu 24.04')

de.description: Desktop environment name (e.g. 'KDE Plasma', 'GNOME', 'Hyprland'); null when not detectable

shell.description: Default login shell (e.g. 'bash', 'zsh', 'fish'); null when not detectable

resolution.description: Primary display resolution (e.g. '2560x1440'); null when not detectable
